text: Our kindness is our downfall! We must kick these Somalians out of kenya!

On 5th July, 1969, they killed Tom Mboya; then took the Wamera Oath drinking blood naked and swearing that the Presidency shall never go to Luoland. In 1969, they massacred Luos in Kisumu and later put Jaramogi under House Arrest. In 1992, they split FORD and stopped Jaramogi Oginga Odinga’s ascendancy to presidency. In 2005, they killed Dr. Odhiambo Mbai, the Chairman of the Devolution Committee at the Bomas of Kenya. In 2007, they blocked Raila’s presidency and swore defeated Kibaki as President in the night In 2017, they killed Dr. Chris Musando, Baby Pendo and several Luos and again rigged Raila’s election to continue Uhuru Kenyatta’s tribal and corrupt rule. In 2022, they voted for Ruto to block Raila from becoming President. In 2024, they left Ruto just because he made peace with Raila and included all Kenyans including Luos in his government. They hate us. Any political arrangement we have with them only works when it is only them to benefit. We are tired of being used. We will no longer be used as if we’re second class citizens. We are equal citizens with our own independent political choices. Orengo & Babu; our people are with President Ruto. Support your in-law Gachagua to continue their domination alone.
